case_title: JOY SMITH WILLIAMS VS. YOUNG KEUN CHO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $904.82 FILED BY WILLIAMS, JOY SMITH AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YOUNG KEUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED AUG-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YOUNG KEUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506. PLAINTIFF JOY WILLIAMS IS PRESENT . DEFENDANT YOUNG KEUN CHO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YOUNG KEUN
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-02-2019
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JOY SMITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, YOUNG KEUN $904.82 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,084.82, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $904.82 PLUS COSTS. PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT OF THE ACCIDENT IS CONSISTENT WITH THE PHOTOGRAPHS. DEFENDANT HAD A DUTY TO MAINTAIN A SAFE DISTANCE FROM THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
